title: Anathallis fastigiata
taxonomy: Anathallis fastigiata is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Anathallis fastigiata is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Maxillarieae. This species is native to South America and is a member of the genus Anathallis. Anathallis fastigiata is closely related to other species within the Anathallis genus, sharing similar characteristics and growth habits.
